Definition: contemporary binomial nomenclature as printed in the Zenodo data sheet

Reference: e.g. Plecturocebus moloch for Callicebus moloch

Definition: binomial nomenclature used by McComb & Semple (2005)
Reference: the name under which the original repertoire size was recorded

Definition: vocal repertoire size (number of distinct vocalization types) from McComb & Semple 2005
Note: original values compiled by McComb & Semple 2005

Definition: vocal repertoire size (number of distinct vocalization types), contemporary update
Note: equals the MS2005 value where no update was available

Definition: reference for the contemporary update to vocal repertoire size (if any)
Reference: NA where the value is unchanged from McComb & Semple 2005

Definition: repertoire size = count of distinct call/vocalization types catalogued for the species; a discrete count not a rate
